theme_and_archetype.primary_archetype: Archetype 5 (Jewel & Luxury) with a touch of Urban Nightlife
theme_and_archetype.vibe: Cinematic, moody, expensive, warm orange neon glow, rainy Copenhagen night, Scandinavian minimalism, Instagrammable hidden gem.

headings.h1: text-5xl md:text-6xl lg:text-7xl tracking-tight leading-none font-medium

spacing_and_layout.grid_strategy: Asymmetric Bento grid (Tetris Mode) for Gallery. Generous gaps (gap-8 to gap-12). Leave negative space for 'breathing room'. Mobile-first column stacking.

surfaces_and_borders.glassmorphism: Use 'backdrop-blur-xl bg-black/40 border border-white/10' for sticky headers, floating cards, and the review carousel. Do not use flat gray.
surfaces_and_borders.cards: Subtle border (border-white/5), flat dark background, slight image zoom on hover.
surfaces_and_borders.glow_effects: Use absolute positioned blurred divs (blur-[100px]) with low opacity amber/orange to create floating light leaks behind sections.

motion_and_animations.scroll: MANDATORY: Use lenis or a similar smooth scroll for that 'addictive scrolling feeling'.
motion_and_animations.entrance: Staggered fade-up and slight blur-reveal for text using framer-motion.
motion_and_animations.micro_interactions: Smooth scale on hover for images (duration-700 ease-out), glowing borders on hover for interactive cards.
motion_and_animations.particles: Add ambient floating particles (using framer-motion or a lightweight canvas library) in the Hero and Atmosphere sections for the 'rainy night' aesthetic.

components.navigation: Glassmorphism sticky header with a blur. Visible links on desktop.
components.hero: Fullscreen relative container, absolute image with bg-black/50 overlay, text centered or left-aligned with a text-shadow for readability.

buttons.primary: bg-amber-600 text-white rounded-full px-8 py-4 hover:bg-amber-500 transition-colors shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(217,119,6,0.4)]
buttons.secondary: backdrop-blur-md bg-white/5 border border-white/20 text-white rounded-full px-8 py-4 hover:bg-white/10 transition-colors

components.product_cards: Custom HTML/Tailwind. Image container with overflow-hidden, image scales on hover. Text below image.

image_urls.description: Cinematic rainy street outside cafe with amber neon glow
Atmospheric interior of a dim, cozy cafe bar at night
Gourmet chocolate truffles and wine on dark table
Luxury dark gift basket with champagne
Rich dark chocolate ice cream texture
Glowing orange neon sign on textured wall
Warm inviting street cafe exterior night
Macro shot of praline chocolates on dark glass
Wine bottle and grapes dark aesthetic

page_structure_and_content.details: Sticky glassmorphism nav with Logo 'LARSEN' and links: Produkter, Atmosfære, Anmeldelser, Galleri, Kontakt.

Fullscreen hero. Use 'hero' image. Title: 'Hernings hyggeligste spot ✨'. Subtitle: 'Vin, chokolade, café og gode aftener samlet ét sted.' Buttons: 'Besøg LARSEN' and 'Se menu & favoritter'. Add ambient particle effect or subtle background floating gradient to simulate light leaks.
Grid or horizontal scroller of dark cards showing: Gourmet chokolade, Specialøl, Vin & spiritus, Is og søde sager, Gavekurve. Use specific product images mapped above.

Split layout. Left: Large typography 'En skjult hygge-perle midt i Herning hvor folk mødes over kaffe, søde sager og gode vibes.' Right: 'atmosphere' image. Add glowing orange orb blur behind the text.

Cinematic carousel (Framer motion or pure CSS) with frosted glass cards. Quotes: 'Mega hyggeligt sted', 'Virkelig god service', 'Perfekt til en rolig kaffe', 'Fantastisk udvalg af vin og chokolade', 'En af Hernings hyggeligste butikker'. Font: Italic serif.
Bento 'Tetris' Grid combining gallery_1, gallery_2, gallery_3, and gallery_4 images. Mix 1 large span, 2 squares, 1 tall. No gaps between images or thick black gaps.
Embed Google Maps (styled dark with CSS filter: invert(90%) hue-rotate(180deg)). Next to it: 'Bredgade 48, Herning' and long opening hours text.
Massive typography 'LARSEN'. Links to Instagram, Facebook, Kontakt. Deep dark background, minimal borders.

critical_rules: ALL interactive elements MUST include data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='hero-cta-button').
NO placeholder images. Use ONLY the URLs provided in the image_urls array.
Do not use generic fonts like Inter or Roboto for headings. Use the specified Cormorant Garamond.
Ensure contrast ratios are met. Text over images must have a gradient overlay or text-shadow.
Do not use a flat blanket overlay that kills the entire hero image. Max overlay opacity bg-black/50.
Provide a smooth scrolling experience using Lenis or Framer Motion.
Files are in .js, provide implementation for Javascript React (.js/.jsx) NOT TypeScript.
